proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage IV.
Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than male sex.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope for ecog_ps = -1.190 months per unit, p=0.00e+00.
Mean PFS stage IV=3.70 vs non-IV=5.05, diff=-1.352 mo, p=0.00e+00.
OLS slope for age_years = 0.1765 months per year of age, p=0.00e+00.
Mean PFS female=4.31 vs male=4.31, diff=-0.006 mo, p=0.7703.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRAF V600E mutation (braf_v600e=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than wild-type.
KRAS mutation (kras_mutation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than wild-type.
NRAS mutation (nras_mutation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than wild-type.
MSI-high status (msi_high=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than microsatellite-stable disease.
Right-sided primary tumor (right_sided_primary=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than left-sided.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS NRAS mut=4.53 vs not=4.30, diff=0.221 mo, p=0.0007 (n1=1506, n0=48494).
Mean PFS right-sided=4.11 vs not=4.42, diff=-0.305 mo, p=1.04e-49 (n1=17657, n0=32343).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher CEA (cea_ng_ml) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher serum albumin (albumin_g_dl) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater 6-month weight loss percent (weight_loss_pct_6mo) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher C-reactive protein (crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Presence of liver metastases (liver_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Presence of bone metastases (bone_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope cea_ng_ml = -0.00535 mo/unit, p=3.13e-17.
OLS slope albumin_g_dl = 0.46536 mo/unit, p=3.25e-115.
OLS slope ldh_u_l = -0.00032 mo/unit, p=0.0126.
OLS slope weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07302 mo/unit, p=2.21e-167.
OLS slope nlr = 0.00522 mo/unit, p=0.2896.
OLS slope crp_mg_l = -0.00202 mo/unit, p=0.0650.
Mean PFS liver mets=4.30 vs not=4.31, diff=-0.019 mo, p=0.5189.
Mean PFS bone mets=4.34 vs not=4.31, diff=0.031 mo, p=0.2248.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have different (likely longer) pfs_months than those not receiving cetuximab in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have longer pfs_months than those not receiving bevacizumab in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different pfs_months than those not receiving pembrolizumab in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have different pfs_months than those not receiving encorafenib in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have different pfs_months than those not receiving it in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have shorter pfs_months than those not receiving regorafenib in the overall cohort (later-line treatment indicator).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS on cetuximab=4.29 vs off=4.32, diff=-0.038 mo, p=0.0880.
Mean PFS on bevacizumab=4.30 vs off=4.32, diff=-0.019 mo, p=0.3544.
Mean PFS on pembrolizumab=4.32 vs off=4.31, diff=0.005 mo, p=0.8557.
Mean PFS on encorafenib=4.32 vs off=4.31, diff=0.005 mo, p=0.8725.
Mean PFS on trastuzumab+tucatinib=4.27 vs off=4.32, diff=-0.044 mo, p=0.2435.
Mean PFS on regorafenib=5.09 vs off=4.12, diff=0.972 mo, p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_cetuximab is larger in KRAS wild-type (kras_mutation=0) than KRAS mutant (kras_mutation=1) patients (positive cetuximab x KRAS-WT interaction).
Within KRAS wild-type patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.
Within KRAS mutant patients, treatment_cetuximab is not associated with longer pfs_months (and may be associated with shorter) compared to no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient cetuximab:kras_mutation = 0.020 mo, p=0.6649. Negative => cetuximab benefit shrinks/reverses in KRAS mutants.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_cetuximab within KRAS-WT
analyses.result_summary: KRAS-WT: PFS cetux on=4.42 vs off=4.46, diff=-0.048 mo, p=0.1215.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_cetuximab within KRAS-mut
analyses.result_summary: KRAS-mut: PFS cetux on=4.10 vs off=4.13, diff=-0.028 mo, p=0.3755.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is reduced in NRAS-mutant compared to NRAS-wild-type patients (negative cetuximab × NRAS interaction).
Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is reduced in BRAF V600E mutant compared to BRAF wild-type patients (negative cetuximab × BRAF interaction).
Within RAS/RAF wild-type patients (kras=0 & nras=0 & braf_v600e=0), treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab, with a larger effect than in the unselected cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction cetuximab:nras = -0.007 mo, p=0.9596.
Interaction cetuximab:braf_v600e = -0.026 mo, p=0.8051.
RAS/RAF WT (n=25324): PFS cetux on=4.44 vs off=4.49, diff=-0.045 mo, p=0.1704.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is greater in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) than right-sided (right_sided_primary=1) primaries (negative cetuximab × right-sided interaction).
Within left-sided primaries, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction cetuximab:right_sided_primary = 0.026 mo, p=0.5834.
Left-sided: PFS cetux on=4.39 vs off=4.43, diff=-0.049 mo, p=0.0859.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in MSI-high (msi_high=1) than in non-MSI-high patients (positive pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction).
Within MSI-high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Within microsatellite-stable patients (msi_high=0), treatment_pembrolizumab is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction pembrolizumab:msi_high = 0.002 mo, p=0.9879.
MSI-H (n=2513): PFS pembro on=4.30 vs off=4.29, diff=0.007 mo, p=0.9568.
MSS (n=47487): PFS pembro on=4.32 vs off=4.31, diff=0.005 mo, p=0.8610.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_encorafenib is larger in BRAF V600E mutant (braf_v600e=1) than wild-type patients (positive encorafenib × braf_v600e interaction).
Within BRAF V600E mutant patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.
Within BRAF wild-type patients, treatment_encorafenib is not associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction encorafenib:braf_v600e = -0.141 mo, p=0.3762.
BRAF-V600E (n=2272): PFS encorafenib on=3.98 vs off=4.11, diff=-0.129 mo, p=0.3291.
BRAF-WT (n=47728): PFS encorafenib on=4.33 vs off=4.32, diff=0.013 mo, p=0.7177.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is larger in HER2-amplified (her2_amplified=1) than non-amplified patients (positive interaction).
Within HER2-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months than no trastuzumab/tucatinib.
Within HER2-non-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is not associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction tras_tuc:her2_amplified = 0.063 mo, p=0.7778.
HER2+ (n=1504): PFS tras_tuc on=4.27 vs off=4.26, diff=0.017 mo, p=0.9344.
HER2- (n=48496): PFS tras_tuc on=4.27 vs off=4.32, diff=-0.046 mo, p=0.2316.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months across the cohort independent of biomarker status (no strong biomarker selection).
Bevacizumab benefit is similar between KRAS-mutant and KRAS-wild-type patients (no significant bevacizumab × kras interaction).
Bevacizumab benefit is similar between right-sided and left-sided primaries (no significant bevacizumab × right-sided interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS bevacizumab effect = -0.019 mo, p=0.3544.
Interaction bevacizumab:kras_mutation = -0.004 mo, p=0.9151.
Interaction bevacizumab:right_sided_primary = -0.022 mo, p=0.6081.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_regorafenib has different (likely shorter) pfs_months effect than no regorafenib in the overall cohort, reflecting later-line use.
Regorafenib effect on pfs_months differs by prior_lines_of_therapy (interaction term significant).

analyses.result_summary: OLS regorafenib effect = 0.972 mo, p=0.00e+00.
Interaction regorafenib:prior_lines = 0.016 mo, p=0.4766.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, sex, ECOG, stage_iv, key biomarkers, and disease burden, treatment_cetuximab remains associated with longer pfs_months (adjusted main effect remains positive on average; in cohort it may be diluted by RAS mutants).
After adjusting for ECOG, stage_iv, age, sex, biomarkers, and disease burden, MSI-high status remains a positive prognostic biomarker for pfs_months.
After adjusting, BRAF V600E remains a poor-prognosis biomarker (negative association with pfs_months).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient treatment_cetuximab = -0.011 mo, p=0.1962.
Adjusted coefficient msi_high = -0.009 mo, p=0.6282.
Adjusted coefficient braf_v600e = -0.356 mo, p=4.69e-79.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment effect of bevacizumab on pfs_months is smaller in patients with ECOG ≥2 than ECOG 0–1 (negative bevacizumab × ECOG≥2 interaction).
Treatment effect of cetuximab on pfs_months is smaller in patients with ECOG ≥2 than ECOG 0–1 (negative cetuximab × ECOG≥2 interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_bevacizumab:ecog_ge2 = 0.036 mo, p=0.5233.
Interaction treatment_cetuximab:ecog_ge2 = 0.072 mo, p=0.2376.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_pembrolizumab does not vary substantially with age_years (no significant pembrolizumab × age interaction).
The pfs_months effect of treatment_bevacizumab decreases with increasing age (negative bevacizumab × age interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:age_years = 0.0006 mo per year, p=0.7412.
Interaction treatment_bevacizumab:age_years = 0.0000 mo per year, p=0.9904.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment effects on pfs_months do not differ between female and male patients for cetuximab (no significant cetuximab × sex_female interaction).
Treatment effects on pfs_months do not differ between female and male patients for pembrolizumab (no significant pembrolizumab × sex_female interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_cetuximab:sex_female = -0.031 mo, p=0.4836.
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:sex_female = 0.037 mo, p=0.5152.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (overall ANOVA).
Black patients have shorter pfs_months than white patients on average (race_ethnicity main effect).

analyses.result_summary: ANOVA F=0.872, p=0.4795 across race_ethnicity.

analyses.code: OLS with race_ethnicity vs white reference
analyses.result_summary: Black vs white coefficient = -0.042 mo, p=0.1894.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (overall ANOVA).
Uninsured patients have shorter pfs_months than privately insured patients.
Rural residence (rural_residence=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-rural.

analyses.result_summary: Uninsured vs private coefficient = -0.082 mo, p=0.1288.
PFS rural=4.33 vs non-rural=4.31, diff=0.024 mo, p=0.3388.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greater number of comorbidities (sum of diabetes_mellitus, hypertension, copd, chronic_kidney_disease, heart_failure, coronary_artery_disease, atrial_fibrillation) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
History of venous_thromboembolism_history is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Comorb count slope = -0.006 mo per condition, p=0.5606.
PFS VTE hx=4.30 vs no VTE hx=4.31, diff=-0.014 mo, p=0.7454.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Slope fatigue_grade = -0.002 mo per unit, p=0.8530.
Slope pain_nrs = -0.002 mo per unit, p=0.5467.
Slope appetite_loss_grade = -0.000 mo per unit, p=0.9830.

proposed_hypotheses.text: None of the candidate SNPs (snp_rs* columns coded as additive 0/1/2 dosages) are individually significantly associated with pfs_months after Bonferroni correction across the SNP panel.

analyses.code: loop OLS pfs_months ~ snp_rsXXX for each SNP; Bonferroni alpha=0.05/N
analyses.result_summary: Tested 27 SNPs. Bonferroni-significant SNPs: 0. Smallest p across SNPs: snp_rs1050828 b=0.092, p=0.0153.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, sex, ECOG, stage_iv, biomarkers, and disease burden, lower albumin_g_dl is independently associated with shorter pfs_months.
After adjusting, higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is independently associated with shorter pfs_months.
After adjusting, higher NLR (nlr) is independently associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient albumin_g_dl = 0.46936 mo per unit, p=0.00e+00.
Adjusted coefficient ldh_u_l = -0.00042 mo per unit, p=6.71e-19.
Adjusted coefficient nlr = 0.00320 mo per unit, p=0.0845.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model with cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction (adjusting for age, sex, ECOG, stage_iv, right_sided, biomarkers), the cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction remains significantly negative.
In a multivariable model with pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction, the interaction remains significantly positive after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with cetuximab × kras interaction
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction cetuximab:kras_mutation = 0.018 mo, p=0.3025.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction pembrolizumab:msi_high = 0.058 mo, p=0.2310.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the BRAF V600E mutant subgroup, the combination of treatment_encorafenib AND treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_encorafenib alone (interaction term encorafenib×cetuximab>0 within BRAF-mut).

Within HER2-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib effect is larger when patients are KRAS wild-type than KRAS mutant (negative trastuzumab_tucatinib × kras_mutation interaction in HER2+ subset).

analyses.code: OLS within BRAF-V600E: pfs_months ~ encorafenib * cetuximab
analyses.result_summary: BRAF-V600E subset (n=2272): interaction encorafenib:cetuximab = 0.323 mo, p=0.3230.

analyses.code: OLS within HER2+ : pfs_months ~ tras_tuc * kras_mutation
analyses.result_summary: HER2+ subset (n=1504): interaction tras_tuc:kras_mutation = -0.194 mo, p=0.6721.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a single OLS model jointly estimating cetuximab × kras_mutation, pembrolizumab × msi_high, encorafenib × braf_v600e, and trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interactions while adjusting for clinical/lab covariates, all four biomarker-matched treatment interactions are in the expected direction (cetuximab benefit smaller in KRAS-mut; pembrolizumab, encorafenib, and trastuzumab_tucatinib benefits larger in their matched biomarker groups).
After jointly adjusting for biomarker-matched interactions and clinical covariates, ECOG_ps and stage_iv remain significant prognostic features for pfs_months.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS with four biomarker × treatment interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation = 0.018 mo, p=0.2980.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS with four biomarker × treatment interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high = 0.058 mo, p=0.2287.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS with four biomarker × treatment interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e = -0.018 mo, p=0.7610.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS with four biomarker × treatment interactions
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified = 0.002 mo, p=0.9767.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS — prognostic main effects
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient ecog_ps = -1.171 mo, p=0.00e+00.

analyses.code: Final joint adjusted OLS — prognostic main effects
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient stage_iv = -1.362 mo, p=0.00e+00.
